message:
feat(mux,codec): FrankenMux integration — wire protocol + integration tests [ft-2dd4s.5]

Add 5 new codec PDUs for swap layout and stack operations:
SwapToLayout(68), SetLayoutCycle(69), CycleStack(70),
SelectStackPane(71), UpdatePaneConstraints(72).

Add 3 FrankenMux integration tests verifying floating panes + swap
layouts + constraint resize + zoom all work together without interference.
Add 7 codec roundtrip tests for the new PDUs.

All 342 tests pass (226 mux + 107 codec + 9 codec_coverage).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
